title: The conditions for maintaining the Corsican chestnut grove and the production of Protected Designation of Origin (PDO) flour in the face of its new uses and bioclimatic issues
description: A practice abstract presenting strategies to sustain Corsican chestnut groves and Protected Designation of Origin flour production amid evolving uses and bioclimatic challenges. It outlines the need for orchard renovation, production consolidation, and collaborative governance within a Mountain Reference Landscape framework.
